game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Aventureros al Tren® is a turn-based digital board game where 2-5 players compete to build railway routes across a map. Each turn, players choose one action: draw two train cards (from 5 face-up or a hidden deck), draw three new destination tickets (keeping at least one), or claim a route by discarding a specific number of matching colored train cards (e.g., 3 red cards for a 3-segment red route). Players tap on visible cards or decks to draw, and tap/drag on the map to select and confirm route claims. The game ends when any player has 3 or fewer train pieces remaining, triggering one final round for all players. Points are awarded for claimed routes (e.g., 1 point for 1 segment, 15 points for 6 segments), completed destination tickets, and the longest continuous route, with the highest score winning.
game_info.description: Build railway routes across North America in this turn-based strategy game! Collect colored train cards and claim routes between cities to score points. Complete destination tickets to earn bonus points by connecting specific cities. The game ends when a player has 3 or fewer trains left, triggering the final round. Win by having the highest score from claimed routes, completed destinations, and the longest continuous path!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select cards/routes
Space: Confirm selection or action
Z: Cancel current action or go back
Shift: Toggle between draw cards/claim route/draw destinations actions
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including card drawing, route claiming, and turn progression. Validates that the game can handle multiple turns with different actions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Perform a sequence of basic actions: draw train cards from the deck, draw face-up cards, and attempt to claim short routes when sufficient cards are available.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully completes multiple turns without errors, demonstrates proper card management, and validates that routes can be claimed with matching cards.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully completes multiple turns without errors, demonstrates proper card management, and validates that routes can be claimed with matching cards.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by efficiently collecting cards and claiming high-value routes while completing destination tickets. This validates the complete game loop including the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focus on collecting specific card colors to claim longer routes (4-6 segments) for maximum points. Strategically complete at least one destination ticket while building the longest continuous path for bonus points.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state with a high score (80+ points) by successfully claiming multiple routes, completing destinations, and achieving the longest path bonus within reasonable turns.
